params.name: Gaia Mission
params.description: The Gaia Mission, launched by the European Space Agency, is a space telescope mission aimed at mapping a high-precision three-dimensional star chart of billions of stars in the Milky Way, revealing the structure, formation, and evolution of the galaxy. The mission's main objectives include creating a three-dimensional star chart of about one billion stars in the Milky Way, recording information such as the stars' positions, movements, luminosity, temperature, and composition.
